items.title: Should You Buy This Artificial Intelligence (AI) Stock Before 2025?
items.author: Anders Bylund
items.description: IBM's generative AI platform, watsonx, has secured $3 billion in multiyear contracts, and the company's AI-boosted System Z mainframes are expected to drive growth in 2025. Despite a modest Q3 report, IBM's AI and cloud businesses are showing strong performance, positioning the company for an 'upward inflection in growth' next year.

insights.sentiment_reasoning: The article highlights IBM's strong performance in its AI and cloud businesses, with its generative AI platform watsonx securing $3 billion in multiyear contracts. The company's AI-boosted System Z mainframes are also expected to drive growth in 2025, and the CEO has expressed confidence in the company's ability to deliver an 'upward inflection in growth' next year.
The article mentions Nvidia as a competitor in the AI market, but does not provide any specific information about the company's performance or outlook.
The article mentions Microsoft as a competitor in the AI market, but does not provide any specific information about the company's performance or outlook.
